scripts.sync: turbo run build --filter=@concordex-ai/skill-builder && node packages/cli/dist/index.js sync ./skills
scripts.sync:dry: turbo run build --filter=@concordex-ai/skill-builder && node packages/cli/dist/index.js sync ./skills --dry-run
scripts.imagine: turbo run build --filter=@concordex-ai/skill-builder && node packages/cli/dist/index.js generate --out ./skills --publish
scripts.imagine:dry: turbo run build --filter=@concordex-ai/skill-builder && node packages/cli/dist/index.js generate --dry-run
